title: PhD
content:
PhD

Üsküdar University Doctoral Programs

Üsküdar University offers qualified education opportunities for those who want to advance in their professional and academic career and contribute to their personal development with its doctoral programs on unique subjects with its strong academic staff. Üsküdar University doctoral program students also have the opportunity to practice in NPISTANBUL Brain Hospital, NP Etiler and Feneryolu Medical Centers and laboratories.

What is a Doctorate Program?

Doctorate is an education program offered to specialize in the field of education after completing a bachelor's or master's degree program. Doctorate programs are applied for according to the conditions determined by the Council of Higher Education - YÖK. There may also be different additional conditions by the university. Doctoral education aims to take the person's field of specialization to a higher level. People who complete the doctorate program are given the title of 'Doctor' by YÖK. Doctorate Programs at Üsküdar University take place in Üsküdar Çarşı and Altunizade Central campuses.

How to Apply to Üsküdar University Doctorate Programs?

Üsküdar University doctoral programs can be applied online. Advance payment discount is applied on doctoral program fees. Üsküdar University offers a 20% discount to students who complete their master's degree programs with thesis and are entitled to continue their doctoral program. Turkish Armed Forces, Police Force, Ministry of Health, Ministry of Family and Social Policies, Ministry of Health, Ministry of Family and Social Policies, University and National Education Members, employees subject to 657 are subject to a 10% discount on education and training fees. In addition, staff discount is also applied according to the working period.

What are Üsküdar University Doctoral Programs?

PhD Programme in Forensic Sciences

PhD Programme in Speech and Language Therapy

PhD Programme in Physiology

PhD Programme in Visual Communication Design

PhD Programme in Islamic Civilisation, Thought, History and Literature

Doctoral Programme in Occupational Health and Safety

Doctoral Programme in Clinical Anatomy

Doctoral Programme in Neuroscience

Doctoral Programme in Psychology

Doctoral Programme in Health Management

Doctoral Programme in Medical Genetics

Doctoral Programme in International Relations

Doctoral Programme in New Media and Communication
